creator: wollman@csail.mit.edu
text:
<<On Wed, 9 Jan 2013 23:41:17 GMT, flo@FreeBSD.org said:

> This is a feature "MAKE_JOBS_SAFE= yes" in the Makefile, you want to set
> DISABLE_MAKE_JOBS=yes in make.conf

That should be the default.  The bsd.port.mk should not arrogate to
itself all of every user's CPU cores.

-GAWollman
